name: compendiq
description: Compendiq - AI-powered knowledge base management with Confluence integration and Ollama LLM backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @compendiq/contracts && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @compendiq/contracts && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run build -w @compendiq/contracts && npm run test -w @compendiq/contracts && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend

//deps-note: These mirror two backend prod deps (kept in sync with backend/package.json) so npm hoists them to the root node_modules. Without this, conflicting majors from a root devDep chain (@lhci/cli → express/yargs) push backend's copy down to backend/node_modules, where the runtime Docker stage — which copies only the root tree and flattens backend/dist to /app/dist — can't reach them. The smoke step in .github/workflows/docker-build.yml guards against this regressing silently.
